data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies choices to reduce decision time, focusing on streamlined navigation.
data.technical_spec: Optimized navigation bars and minimization of options at the decision point.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design principle focusing on large, easily clickable interfaces to improve user interactions.
data.technical_spec: Ensures key interactive elements are larger and closer to the expected interaction path.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Attractive designs create a positive user experience even under challenging usability situations.
data.technical_spec: High-resolution images, smooth animations, and consistent branding to engage users.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Focuses on presenting information in chunks to aid user memory and processing.
data.technical_spec: Content layout that groups related information into digestible sections.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Design consistency across Apple’s online presence to meet user expectations derived from other digital platforms.
data.technical_spec: Unified interface styles and predictability across all Apple online properties.
